REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (711 Broderick Street, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Jun-10-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Sellards for Mary Breda.

The sale was confirmed at $905,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to receipt of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $943,000.00 is required. The Court stated that no distributions are to be made from escrow except for ordinary costs of sale. Mr. Sellards is to prepare the order.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Lazatin.
